2604.13954.title: HINTBench: Horizon-agent Intrinsic Non-attack Trajectory Benchmark
2604.13954.paper_summary: Existing agent-safety evaluation has focused mainly on externally induced risks. Yet agents may still enter unsafe trajectories under benign conditions. We study this complementary but underexplored setting through the lens of \emph{intrinsic} risk, where intrinsic failures remain latent, propagate across long-horizon execution, and eventually lead to high-consequence outcomes. To evaluate this setting, we introduce \emph{non-attack intrinsic risk auditing} and present \textbf{HINTBench}, a benchmark of 629 agent trajectories (523 risky, 106 safe; 33 steps on average) supporting three tasks: risk detection, risk-step localization, and intrinsic failure-type identification. Its annotations are organized under a unified five-constraint taxonomy. Experiments reveal a substantial capability gap: strong LLMs perform well on trajectory-level risk detection, but their performance drops to below 35 Strict-F1 on risk-step localization, while fine-grained failure diagnosis proves even harder. Existing guard models transfer poorly to this setting. These findings establish intrinsic risk auditing as an open challenge for agent safety.
2604.13954.paper_summary_zh: 現有的代理安全評估主要集中在外部誘發的風險上。<lb/>然而，代理在良性條件下仍可能進入不安全的軌跡。<lb/>我們通過\emph{內在}風險的視角研究這一互補但未被充分探索的環境，其中內在故障保持潛伏，並在長期執行中傳播，最終導致高後果的結果。<lb/>為了評估這一環境，我們引入\emph{非攻擊內在風險審計}，並呈現\textbf{HINTBench}，這是一個包含629條代理軌跡（523條風險，106條安全；平均33步）的基準，支持三個任務：風險檢測、風險步驟定位和內在故障類型識別。<lb/>其註釋根據統一的五約束分類法組織。<lb/>實驗顯示出顯著的能力差距：強大的LLM在軌跡級風險檢測上表現良好，但在風險步驟定位上的表現降至35以下的Strict-F1，而細緻的故障診斷則更為困難。<lb/>現有的防護模型在這一環境中的轉移效果不佳。<lb/>這些發現確立了內在風險審計作為代理安全的一個開放挑戰。
2604.13954.author: Jiacheng Wang et.al.
2604.13954.authors: Jiacheng Wang, Jinchang Hou, Fabian Wang, Ping Jian, Chenfu Bao, Zhonghou Lv
